page_content:
Program Learning Outcomes

1. Competency in integrating laboratory skills into analysis of food.

2. Competency in assessing the nutritional status of a patient and in developing an appropriate nutrition treatment plan for the patient

REQUIREMENTS

All students are required to earn a grade of "C-" or better in courses applied toward satisfaction of the major. This includes all required courses with a preﬁx of NFSC, as well as certain required courses in supporting ﬁelds. A list of these courses for each program may be obtained from the department ofﬁce.
